summary: P1.8-4 workflow recommendation ranking: rankWorkflowRecommendations pure function, workflow_recommendations envelope, profile-gated scoring, useOperationsPipeline hook orchestrating load → classify → health → rank. MID_LARGE impact threshold deferred (null) per ADR-026.

interfaceChanges.description: Rules-based ranking producing stable workflow_recommendations envelope.
React hook and pure runner for mock operations pipeline stages.

mappings.criterion: Pure ranking function with typed workflow_recommendations output
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_recommendations.test.ts::returns typed workflow_recommendations with shop_profile and ranked items

mappings.criterion: Unit tests per profile: ordering rules, profile gating, precondition flags
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_recommendations.test.ts::profile gating ordering and precondition flags per shop profile

mappings.criterion: Guard test: recommendations never reference workflow outside validated catalog
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_recommendations.test.ts::never references workflow IDs outside the validated catalog

mappings.criterion: Integration test: mock persona fixture → full classify → health → rank envelope chain via hook
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_pipeline_hook.test.ts::integration mock persona classify health rank envelope chain via hook

mappings.criterion: MID_LARGE impact filter documented as optional/TBD until Product sets threshold
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_recommendations.test.ts::documents impact threshold as unset until Product records value in EXECUTION.md
